creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello Rohana, 

it's a question, not a problem report.  Please turn to the mailing lists 
for a solution, you will probably get support there.  I think, in your 
case questions@FreeBSD.org is the appropriate list, but you can find all 
of our mailing lists here: 

http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo 

Regards, 
Gabor
